mousechase.round.title: Mouse Chase Tutorial Run
mousechase.round.restart: Press R or Enter to restart.
mousechase.tutorial.stay: Step 2: Hold inside the blue zone to build score.
mousechase.tutorial.exit: Step 3: Cross the red zone and exit it once.
mousechase.tutorial.locale: Step 4: Collect the localized shard sprite.
mousechase.tutorial.complete: Tutorial complete: hit target score, then enter the bright yellow gate zone at top-right.
